Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search emails for communications related to Dr. Mehta's executive relocation using search_emails (query: "Mehta" or "Canopy" or "housing" or "equipment" or similar). Discover the full email chain: Patricia Langford's initial relocation request describing the CMO hire, sensitive equipment, and pregnant partner; Mina Hashimoto's acknowledgment; Patricia providing Dr. Mehta's contact details (anand.mehta@canopyhealth.io); Fatimah's detailed introduction email requesting equipment inventory and housing preferences; Dr. Mehta's reply on April 22 with complete equipment inventory (two Eizo RadiForce RX660 monitors S/N RX660-1147A and RX660-1203A, SentrySafe DH-109E filing cabinet with 14 binders of patient research data, paper calibration certificates); Fatimah's email presenting three UrbanNest housing options (River North $1,250/wk, Streeterville $1,350/wk recommended, Gold Coast $1,450/wk) with April 25 EOD deadline. Also discover the two most recent emails: Mina's email to Patricia requesting the chain-of-custody documentation template from Canopy compliance and formal estimate approval (EST-2026-0422, $12,170), and Fatimah's email to Dr. Mehta asking for his housing selection by April 25 and his Boston pickup address (still TBD).
- Search emails for Mei-Lin Zhao's relocation using search_emails (query: "Zhao" or "GreenStack" or "hazmat" or "lithium" or similar). Discover Derek Hollis's detailed request email specifying Class 9 lithium-ion battery modules (~350 lbs, 4 crated modules, UN3481-certified packaging, 15-25°C climate control), the mandatory split shipment, the Houston lab lease hard-ending April 17, and the Portland lab buildout delayed to April 28 creating an 11-day interim storage gap. Discover Emeka Diallo's response coordinating with ops, and Chloe's email confirming Swift Relocations as the hazmat carrier with DOT Class 9 credentials.
- Search Slack for discussions about the Mehta relocation and chain-of-custody using conversations_search_messages (query: "Mehta" or "chain of custody" or "Canopy housing" or similar). Discover: Chloe's three-workstream structure post assigning Fatimah, Fatimah's ticket creation notice (three Linear tickets), David Chen's post about the strategic significance of Canopy's first C-suite placement, Mina's billing heads-up to Marcus Thorne, and Fatimah's consolidated status update showing: (a) Housing — three UrbanNest options presented, awaiting Dr. Mehta's selection by April 25, (b) Equipment — inventory confirmed, anti-static crating plan in progress, chain-of-custody template from Canopy compliance is the critical path blocker, (c) Household move — Swift Relocations standing by pending housing confirmation. Also discover the NorthWind/Raj Patel chain-of-custody breach discussion — movers arrived early and loaded servers without the required IT security escort, documentation trail incomplete, leading to a formal breach escalation from NorthWind's CISO. This is the "internal discussion about chain-of-custody procedures from another client's move" referenced in the prompt.
- Search Slack for discussions about Mei-Lin Zhao and DOT compliance using conversations_search_messages (query: "Zhao" or "DOT" or "hazmat" or "lithium" or "compliance" or similar). Discover Chloe's DOT compliance audit status post showing Mei-Lin Zhao's documentation is COMPLETE across all four DOT categories (shipping papers, hazmat placarding certificates, carrier certifications, emergency response docs). Discover the DOT/PHMSA formal inquiry affecting Swift Relocations' carrier records, Elena's directive establishing mandatory hazmat documentation policy, the $50,000 contingent liability accrual, and the DOT response deadline extension to June 5, 2026.
- Search Linear for tracking tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "Mehta" or "Canopy" or similar). Discover three in-progress tickets assigned to Fatimah: (a) Temporary Housing — Dr. Anand Mehta — Chicago River North (#343, in progress, due May 1), (b) Equipment Packing & Chain-of-Custody — Dr. Mehta — Medical Research Equipment (#375, in progress, due April 30), (c) Household Move — Dr. Anand Mehta — Boston to Chicago (#396, in progress, due May 3).
- Read Linear comments on the Mehta tickets using linear_list_comments to find detailed status. Discover: (a) On the housing ticket — UrbanNest's three options with full details (addresses, amenities, pricing) and the April 25 EOD deadline, (b) On the equipment ticket — Dr. Mehta's confirmed inventory with serial numbers, dimensions, weights, and the chain-of-custody protocol for the SentrySafe filing cabinet (signed handoff log at origin and destination, direct transport only, no warehouse storage, cabinet must remain locked and sealed).
- Search Linear for Zhao-related issues using linear_list_issues (query: "Zhao" or "DOT" or "GreenStack" or similar). Discover the DOT Docs ticket for Mei-Lin Zhao/GreenStack/Class 9 Lithium (status: Done — all documentation verified complete by Chloe).
- Search Airtable for relocation records using airtable_search_records (query: "Zhao" or "Mehta" or similar). Discover Mei-Lin Zhao's record (Houston→Portland, In Progress, April 17-28, hazmat and split shipment details documented). Find no Airtable relocation record for Dr. Mehta — his relocation exists in CRM, Linear, and email but has no Airtable record, which is a tracking gap.
- Search CRM for Canopy Health and GreenStack Energy using crm_search_companies, crm_search_deals, and crm_list_engagements. Discover: (a) Canopy: Mehta executive relocation deal ($12,170, in progress, close date May 7), engagement notes showing this is Canopy's first C-suite placement and longest-standing client since July 2024, (b) GreenStack: Zhao + Reyes deal ($9,440, in progress), engagement notes detailing the hazmat complexity and interim storage coordination with Pacific Crest Logistics.
- Look up contact details for Mina Hashimoto, Emeka Diallo, and Chloe Vance using contacts_search_contacts to obtain email addresses for write actions. Find mina.hashimoto@moveops.com (Canopy AM), emeka.diallo@moveops.com (GreenStack AM), chloe.vance@moveops.com.
- Add comments to the Mehta Linear tickets (via linear_create_comment) documenting current status and next steps: (a) Housing ticket — UrbanNest options presented, awaiting Dr. Mehta's selection, April 25 deadline has passed as of April 26, follow-up email sent asking for selection and Boston address; (b) Equipment ticket — inventory confirmed, anti-static crating plan in progress, chain-of-custody template still outstanding from Canopy compliance, Mina has emailed Patricia requesting it; (c) Household move ticket — Swift Relocations standing by, pending housing confirmation and Boston pickup address.
- Update Airtable relocation record for Mei-Lin Zhao (via airtable_update_records) to reflect current DOT documentation status (complete per Chloe's audit) and note that Houston lease has ended and interim storage is in progress.
- Post a consolidated status message in the #operations Slack channel (channel_id: C006) via conversations_add_message covering both relocations: Dr. Mehta (housing selection pending — April 25 deadline may have expired, chain-of-custody template outstanding from Canopy compliance, estimate awaiting Patricia's approval, Boston address still TBD) and Mei-Lin Zhao (DOT documentation verified complete, Houston lease ended April 17, Portland lab access April 28, interim storage in progress, no documentation gaps). Flag specific blockers and who needs to act.
- Send email (via send_email) from fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com to mina.hashimoto@moveops.com (Canopy Health account manager) covering client-side items needing attention: (a) chain-of-custody documentation template needed from Canopy compliance — Patricia Langford needs to connect MoveOps with the compliance team, (b) formal estimate approval for EST-2026-0422 ($12,170) needed from Patricia, (c) Dr. Mehta's housing selection deadline has passed (April 25), (d) Dr. Mehta's Boston pickup address still TBD.
- Send email (via send_email) from fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com to emeka.diallo@moveops.com (GreenStack Energy account manager) covering the DOT compliance audit status for Mei-Lin Zhao's hazmat shipment, confirming documentation is complete, and flagging the tight timeline with Portland lab access on April 28 and the interim storage coordination.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
